summary: Tested all 8 features: /api/free-categories dynamic data, trial settings persistence, experimental toggle, Gemini AI generate, session is_trial, experimental tab UI, CategorySelectPage dynamic loading. All backend tests pass (6/6). Frontend fully functional.

minor.issue: API expects 'difficulty' as integer (e.g., 100/300/500), not string ('easy'/'medium'/'hard'). Sending string causes 500 ValueError. No input validation/coercion in server.
minor.priority: LOW - test fixed with correct input, but API should handle string input gracefully

action_items: Minor: Add input coercion in /api/ai/generate-questions to handle string difficulty values like 'easy'/'medium'/'hard' mapping to integers, to prevent 500 errors for bad callers.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/ai/generate-questions line 1275: `difficulty = int(body.get('difficulty', 300))` will crash with ValueError if caller sends string like 'easy'. Should use a try/except or mapping dict.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all flows working: CategorySelectPage calls /api/free-categories dynamically, experimental tab shows toggle/team-categories/save, homepage loads correctly

test_results.2_settings_trial_persistence: PASS - PUT /api/settings updates, GET /api/free-categories reflects changes
test_results.4_session_is_trial: PASS - POST /api/game/session returns is_trial=true for unauthenticated user
test_results.5_ai_gemini_generate: PASS - Gemini API works, returns Arabic questions
test_results.7_experimental_tab_ui: PASS - tab-experimental found, UI shows toggle + team category checkboxes + questions list + save button
test_results.8_category_select_page_dynamic: PASS - CategorySelectPage calls /api/free-categories (confirmed via network intercept), shows dynamic categories

context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features working. Gemini AI now replaces Emergent LLM - confirmed working. CategorySelectPage is fully dynamic. Admin experimental tab shows full CRUD UI. Minor: difficulty field in AI generate API needs string-to-int coercion.
